title: Listening - Part 3
description: For each question, write the correct answer in the gap. Write one or two words or a number or a date or a time.
instructions: You will hear one person giving information. For questions 14–19, write the correct answer in the gap.
context: You will hear information for visitors at a museum.
audio_script: Speaker: Good afternoon, and welcome to the town history museum. Before you begin your visit, I will give you some information about today's special family tour. The tour guide is Mr [14]Parker[/14], who wrote a book about this town last year. He will meet you in the entrance hall in a few minutes. The tour begins at [15]two forty[/15], so please stay near the desk until he arrives. The first room you will visit contains old photographs, but please do not use a camera with [16]flash[/16], because bright light can damage the pictures. You may take photos in other parts of the museum, but ask a member of staff first. The most popular object on the tour is a wooden [17]toy boat[/17], made by a child over a hundred years ago. Many visitors are surprised that it is still in such good condition. Mr Parker will also show you an old school desk and some clothes worn by factory workers. After the tour, children can try drawing historical clothes in the [18]activity room[/18]. Parents are welcome to stay and help, or they can visit the museum shop. A family ticket for the museum usually costs eighteen pounds, but today it costs only [19]ten[/19] pounds because it is a local history weekend. The museum closes at five, so you will have plenty of time to see everything. There are toilets near the entrance, and you may leave coats in the free cloakroom. If younger children get tired, they can sit in the reading corner while the rest of the group finishes the tour. Please keep your ticket, as it also gives you a discount in the shop.

questions.explanation: The speaker says the tour guide is Mr Parker.
The speaker says the tour begins at two forty.
The speaker says visitors should not use a camera with flash.
The speaker says the popular object is a wooden toy boat.
The speaker says children can draw in the activity room.
The speaker says the family ticket costs ten pounds today.
